issue.author: ericliuu
issue.body:
The following IR is miscompiled by the CorrelatedValuePropagation pass:
```llvm
define i64 @src(i32 %a) {
  %is_a_nonnegative = icmp sgt i32 %a, 1
  %narrow = select i1 %is_a_nonnegative, i32 %a, i32 0
  %max = sext i32 %narrow to i64
  ret i64 %max
}
```
After running the IR through opt with `-passes="correlated-propagation"`, the sext instruction is replaced with zext:
```llvm
define i64 @tgt(i32 %a) {
  %is_a_nonnegative = icmp sgt i32 %a, 1
  %narrow = select i1 %is_a_nonnegative, i32 %a, i32 0
  %max = zext i32 %narrow to i64
  ret i64 %max
}
```
Unfortunately, passing in undef can cause a value mismatch. An example of this is provided here: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/NGqk4Y
issue.title: [correlated-propagation] miscompile of sext into zext

tests.test_body:
define i1 @clamp_low4(i32 noundef %a) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp sge i32 %a, 5
  br i1 %cmp, label %a_guard, label %out

a_guard:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %sel_cmp = icmp sle i32 %a, 5
  %add = add i32 %a, -1
  %sel = select i1 %sel_cmp, i32 5, i32 %add
  %res = icmp eq i32 %sel, 4
  ret i1 %res

out:                                              ; preds = %entry
  ret i1 false
}

define i1 @clamp_high2(i32 noundef %a) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp sle i32 %a, 5
  br i1 %cmp, label %a_guard, label %out

a_guard:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %sel_cmp = icmp ne i32 %a, 5
  %add = add i32 %a, 1
  %sel = select i1 %sel_cmp, i32 %add, i32 5
  %res = icmp eq i32 %sel, 6
  ret i1 %res

out:                                              ; preds = %entry
  ret i1 false
}

define i1 @clamp_high3(i32 noundef %a) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp sle i32 %a, 5
  br i1 %cmp, label %a_guard, label %out

a_guard:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %sel_cmp = icmp slt i32 %a, 5
  %add = add i32 %a, 1
  %sel = select i1 %sel_cmp, i32 %add, i32 5
  %res = icmp eq i32 %sel, 6
  ret i1 %res

out:                                              ; preds = %entry
  ret i1 false
}

define i1 @clamp_high4(i32 noundef %a) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp sle i32 %a, 5
  br i1 %cmp, label %a_guard, label %out

a_guard:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %sel_cmp = icmp sge i32 %a, 5
  %add = add i32 %a, 1
  %sel = select i1 %sel_cmp, i32 5, i32 %add
  %res = icmp eq i32 %sel, 6
  ret i1 %res

out:                                              ; preds = %entry
  ret i1 false
}

define i1 @not_clamp_high(i32 noundef %a) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp sle i32 %a, 5
  br i1 %cmp, label %a_guard, label %out

a_guard:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %sel_cmp = icmp ne i32 %a, 5
  %add = add i32 %a, 100
  %sel = select i1 %sel_cmp, i32 %add, i32 5
  %res = icmp eq i32 %sel, 105
  ret i1 %res

out:                                              ; preds = %entry
  ret i1 false
}

define i1 @clamp_low1(i32 noundef %a) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp sge i32 %a, 5
  br i1 %cmp, label %a_guard, label %out

a_guard:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %sel_cmp = icmp eq i32 %a, 5
  %add = add i32 %a, -1
  %sel = select i1 %sel_cmp, i32 5, i32 %add
  %res = icmp eq i32 %sel, 4
  ret i1 %res

out:                                              ; preds = %entry
  ret i1 false
}

define i1 @clamp_high1(i32 noundef %a) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp sle i32 %a, 5
  br i1 %cmp, label %a_guard, label %out

a_guard:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %sel_cmp = icmp eq i32 %a, 5
  %add = add i32 %a, 1
  %sel = select i1 %sel_cmp, i32 5, i32 %add
  %res = icmp eq i32 %sel, 6
  ret i1 %res

out:                                              ; preds = %entry
  ret i1 false
}

define i1 @clamp_low3(i32 noundef %a) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp sge i32 %a, 5
  br i1 %cmp, label %a_guard, label %out

a_guard:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %sel_cmp = icmp sgt i32 %a, 5
  %add = add i32 %a, -1
  %sel = select i1 %sel_cmp, i32 %add, i32 5
  %res = icmp eq i32 %sel, 4
  ret i1 %res

out:                                              ; preds = %entry
  ret i1 false
}

define i1 @umin_rhs_overdefined_lhs_range(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
  %assume = icmp ult i32 %b, 42
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %assume)
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %a, %b
  %sel = select i1 %cmp, i32 %b, i32 %a
  %cmp2 = icmp ult i32 %sel, 42
  ret i1 %cmp2
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(inaccessiblemem: write)
declare void @llvm.assume(i1 noundef) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(inaccessiblemem: write) }

define i1 @clamp_low2(i32 noundef %a) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp sge i32 %a, 5
  br i1 %cmp, label %a_guard, label %out

a_guard:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %sel_cmp = icmp ne i32 %a, 5
  %add = add i32 %a, -1
  %sel = select i1 %sel_cmp, i32 %add, i32 5
  %res = icmp eq i32 %sel, 4
  ret i1 %res

out:                                              ; preds = %entry
  ret i1 false
}
